title: Claim Queue Jobs with SKIP LOCKED in MySQL
summary: Claim a small batch of queued jobs in MySQL with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED inside one transaction.
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify priority-based claims, skipping locked rows, fixed batch size, tie-breaking on job_id, and ignoring non-queued jobs.
